title: Smoky Paprika Filipino Tofu Patties
description: These savory and dense tofu patties are perfect for kids and feature smoked paprika to add a smoky flavor without the use of eggs.
instructions: Press tofu with paper towels to remove excess liquid.
Cube the pressed tofu into small pieces and gently press out more moisture if necessary.
In a mixing bowl, combine tofu cubes, garlic powder, oregano, red chili flakes, smoked paprika, salt, and black pepper. Mix well until evenly combined.
Divide the mixture into 6-8 patties of equal size.
Heat oil in an oven-safe skillet over medium heat. Carefully form patties using your hands or a spoon, placing them on the heated skillet.
Once done, serve hot as a snack with a side of rice or greens.
